recommendations.title: My Little Pony: A New Generation
recommendations.overview: Equestria's divided. But a bright-eyed hero believes Earth Ponies, Pegasi and Unicorns should be pals — and, hoof to heart, she’s determined to prove it.

recommendations.title: Tick Tock Tale
recommendations.overview: Amidst an old London clock shop, a small, quirky mantle clock comes to the aide of the store's more expensive clocks when a thief breaks in and threatens to steal them away.

recommendations.title: November
recommendations.overview: In a poor Estonian village, a group of peasants use magic and folk remedies to survive the winter, and a young woman tries to get a young man to love her.

recommendations.title: Maléfique
recommendations.overview: Four prisoners discover a handwritten book of black magic in their cell, and decide to use it to escape.

recommendations.title: The Other
recommendations.overview: A series of gruesome accidents plague a small American farming community in the summer of 1935, encircling two identical twin brothers and their family.

recommendations.title: Howl's Moving Castle
recommendations.overview: Sophie, a young milliner, is turned into an elderly woman by a witch who enters her shop and curses her. She encounters a wizard named Howl and gets caught up in his resistance to fighting for the king.

recommendations.title: Children of the Damned
recommendations.overview: Six children are found spread through out the world that not only have enormous intelligence, but identical intelligence and have a strange bond to each other.

recommendations.title: Mad God
recommendations.overview: A figure known as "The Assassin" descends from the heavens into a nightmarish pit full of monsters, titans, and cruelty.

recommendations.title: Lamp Life
recommendations.overview: Bo Peep explains what happened to herself and her sheep between the events of Toy Story 2 and Toy Story 4.

recommendations.title: Blessed Madness
recommendations.overview: A man dedicated to religion and very faithful husband suddenly finds himself single. The new shop assistant in his shop will overwhelm his life.
